title: Mega Popping Candy Bundle | 28Pcs Variety Box Including Every Flavour | Strawberry, Apple, Blue Raspberry, Cherry, Orange | Fizz Wiz, Tango, Slush Puppy & More | Letterbox Sized
features: 28-Piece Variety Pack – Includes Fizz Wiz, Tango, Crazy Candy Factory, Push Pop Dipperz, and Slush Puppie popping candies for a fizzy flavour explosion.
Fun for All Ages – Perfect for parties, treat bags, candy hampers, or just satisfying your sweet tooth.
Nostalgic & Exciting – A mix of classic and modern popping candies that fizz, crackle, and pop in your mouth.
Individually Wrapped – Each sweet is sealed for freshness, ideal for sharing or saving for later.
Hygienically Packed & Long Shelf Life – All sweets have long expiry dates, and delivered in a letterbox-friendly box.
description: Product description Experience a nostalgic explosion of flavour with the Mega Popping Candy Bundle – a fun-filled 28-piece variety pack bursting with sweet surprises. This fizzy collection includes a delicious mix of favourites like Fizz Wiz, the iconic classic; Tango Popping Candy, inspired by the bold drink flavours; Crazy Candy Factory, packed with wild and wacky sensations; Push Pop Dipperz, perfect for dipping and licking with a fizzy kick; and Slush Puppie Popping Candy, bringing cool and refreshing bursts of flavour. Perfect for parties, gift bags, sweet hampers, or just stocking up your personal stash, each piece is individually wrapped for freshness and fun. Whether you're sharing with friends or keeping them all to yourself, this popping candy bundle delivers a mega treat with every bite. Ingredients See Product Images
